title: Radiovittaria gardneriana
taxonomy: Radiovittaria gardneriana is classified as a species of fern in the family Vittariaceae. This family is part of the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and their allies. Vittariaceae is a small family of ferns commonly known as hook or hair ferns. The genus Radiovittaria is a small genus within the family Vittariaceae, and R. gardneriana is one of its species. The classification of R. gardneriana reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
